## Scope

Describe the single behavior changed by this pull request and what is excluded.

## Risk

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Affected boundaries:
- Rollback or recovery path:

## Verification

List every command, device check, and result.

- [ ] Relevant automated checks pass.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included.
- [ ] Post-approval changes will trigger a new review.

## Privacy and security

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, keys, Gmail content, or private diagnostics are included.
- [ ] Sensitive logging and persistence implications were reviewed.
- [ ] New dependencies and unsafe code are identified and justified.

## Language

- [ ] Code, identifiers, comments, docs, fixtures, UI source copy, and developer-facing output are in English.

## Review outcome

- [ ] The reviewer is independent from the implementer.
- [ ] All actionable findings, including non-blocking findings, are resolved.
- [ ] The final review reports zero remaining findings.

## DCO

- [ ] Every commit includes a `Signed-off-by` line.
